sql.if: AND (APPLY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR EVENT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE VOL_SEQ = #{volSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
